title: chrysopogon polyphyllus
intro: Chrysopogon polyphyllus, also known as vetiver or khus, is a type of perennial grass that is native to tropical Asia and is valued for its fragrant roots and stems. The medicinal properties of C. polyphyllus include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of C. polyphyllus include essential oils, extracts, and powders, which can be used in aromatherapy, teas, and traditional medicine.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", chrysopogon polyphyllus benefits include having a special property of anti-hidden hunger due to its active ingredients, such as saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids.
